subsection.heading: Federal Charter.—
subsection.content: American War Mothers (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

subsection.heading: Place of Incorporation.—
subsection.content: The corporation is declared to be incorporated in the District of Columbia.

subsection.heading: Period of Existence.—
subsection.content: The corporation may continue to exist until there are no individuals who qualify for membership.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 303, §§ 1, 2, 5 (words between colon and 1st comma), 13, 15, 43 Stat. 966, 967, 968.

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:right; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;

note.p: This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary and executed words.
The text of 36:92, 103, and 105 is omitted as executed and obsolete.
